nodes.name: Brown-and-yellow marshbird
nodes.summary: The brown-and-yellow marshbird (Pseudoleistes virescens) is a species of bird in the family Icteridae. It is found in the Pampas and north to the Paraguayan border and Rio Grande do Sul, where its natural habitats are swamps and pastureland. References External links Photo – oiseaux.net
